title: ReEstrogen Additions
description: ReEstrogen Additions adds new features to the ReEstrogen mod! Mostly suggestions from the community!
body:
ReEstrogen Additions adds new features to the ReEstrogen mod! Mostly suggestions from the community!

**REQUIRES REESTROGEN**


**Currently Adds:**
- New processing to hrt inspired by the original Estrogen mod! (crafting from original mod still works!)
- New machine "Horse Drain" for draining fluids!
- New recipes for all the fluids for the ReEstrogen.
- Horses drop Gelatin from the ReEstrogen mod when killed!.
- New Advancement!
- Additional Create Integration
